data.title: New Mexico DFA obtains $72M in extra funds with Euna Grants, enhancing efficiency and transparency in public funding.
data.description: In Atlanta and Toronto, Euna Solutions®, a top provider of specialized cloud solutions for the public sector, is commending the New Mexico Department of Finance and Administration (DFA) for their milestone in establishing a higher standard for effective and transparent public funding practices. By utilizing Euna Grants, a platform aimed at managing grants to enhance efficiency and transparency in the grants lifecycle, DFA has revolutionized its methods for planning, funding, and managing grants.

data.title: Women We Admire honors Top 50 Women Leaders in Mississippi for 2025, recognizing cultural and economic contributions.
data.description: Women We Admire has recently revealed the list of The Top 50 Women Leaders of Mississippi for the year 2025. This announcement was made in New York on December 10, 2025. Mississippi, recognized for its cultural significance, has selected these outstanding women to represent leadership in various sectors.

data.title: Picaboo Yearbooks reveals 2025 Hall of Fame winners, highlighting creativity & excellence across global submissions.
data.description: Picaboo Yearbooks recognizes and honors creativity and excellence in yearbook design with its yearly Hall of Fame. In 2025, exceptional yearbooks were highlighted from a large pool of entries worldwide. The winners, chosen from various educational levels, exemplify innovative achievements in the field of yearbook production. The Hall of Fame serves as a platform to showcase...

data.title: Parkinson Association of Alabama leads Independent Parkinson's Network, impacting national and international efforts in Parkinson's care.
data.description: Alabama is making significant contributions to the advocacy for Parkinson's disease on a global scale through the Parkinson Association of Alabama's (PAA) active participation in the Independent Parkinson's Network (IPN). The IPN is a coalition of regional nonprofit organizations focused on advancing Parkinson's disease initiatives. The PAA is leading the charge and raising awareness for the cause, representing the state's commitment to the fight against Parkinson's. This collaboration has enabled Alabama to have a strong presence in national and international discussions surrounding Parkinson's disease, bringing attention to the issue and promoting crucial research and support efforts. The IPN consists of numerous organizations working together towards a common goal, with the PAA playing a key role in amplifying the collective voice. Alabama's efforts within the IPN are not only strengthening the fight against Parkinson's disease but also highlighting the importance of unity in addressing health challenges. The PAA's dedication and influence within the IPN are instrumental in driving progress and garnering support for individuals affected by Parkinson's disease. Through their active engagement, Alabama is playing a vital role in shaping the future of Parkinson's advocacy, emphasizing the impact of collaborative action in addressing complex health issues.

data.title: U.S. becomes leading export market for Albariño wines from D.O. Rías Baixas with 25 years of growth, record sales.
data.description: Spain's renowned white wine region, Rías Baixas, has seen exponential growth in its Albariño Wines export to the United States. Over the past 25 years, the region has established the U.S. as its primary global market for these wines. The demand for Albariño Wines from Rías Baixas has surged, surpassing industry standards. The D.O. Rías Baixas in Pontevedra, Spain, disclosed this remarkable development on December 10, 2025.

data.title: Kristina Libby wins Best Storytelling Show Award at 2025 United Solo Festival for her debut show "Holy Sh*t, I Almost Died for This?!"
data.description: On December 10, 2025, Kristina Libby, a prominent New Yorker, McSweeney's contributor, celebrated public artist, and winner of the Moth Story Slam, premiered her solo show titled "Holy Sh*t, I Almost Died for This?!" at the renowned United Solo Festival at Theatre Row in New York City. The show marks Libby's first foray into solo performances and showcases her talents in a new format. This debut garnered significant attention, drawing in an audience of thousands and receiving rave reviews for its unique blend of humor, storytelling, and artistry. Libby's successful debut at the United Solo Festival solidifies her position as a multifaceted talent to watch in the entertainment industry.

data.title: NSGW donates $6,000 to restore Dutch Flat's Chinese Cemetery, preserving $ key piece of history.
data.description: In a collaborative effort, Native Sons of the Golden West has teamed up with Auburn Parlor #59 to aid in the restoration of a significant Chinese American historical site in Dutch Flat. The generous donation by NSGW totaled $6,000 and will contribute to the preservation of this important piece of history. This partnership showcases a commitment to honoring and safeguarding the cultural heritage of the region, highlighting the value of community involvement in historical conservation efforts.

data.title: VinFast from Vietnam strengthens EV aspirations with Canadian tech, surpassing 20k electric SUVs production.
data.description: In Markham, Ontario, VinFast in Southeast Asia is showcasing their EV ambitions through their Canadian presence, demonstrating how a local automaker like VinFast from Vietnam is playing a key role in shaping the region's electric future. The Hai Phong plant of VinFast came to life in the early morning as a fleet of electric SUVs were seen heading towards transport trucks, symbolizing Vietnam's rapid transition towards electric mobility. The company recently exceeded the milestone of producing over twenty thousand electric vehicles, solidifying their position in the market.

data.title: Leadership Now Project reveals slate of 2026 candidates, emphasizing centrist, solution-oriented leaders. Spotlighting need for political talent.
data.description: A group called Leadership Now Project unveiled its list of candidates for the 2026 elections in New York today. This organization consists of business leaders aiming to safeguard democracy for economic prosperity and political harmony. The lineup includes individuals known for their pragmatic approach and practical background, aligning with the organization's objective of promoting centrist and solution-oriented figures in politics. This announcement marks the beginning of a larger campaign to emphasize the critical requirement for fresh political talent in the upcoming elections.

data.title: In 2026, UPM will release financial reports and hold AGM; schedule announced on Dec. 11, 2025 at 13:00 EET.
data.description: UPM-Kymmene Corporation has announced its financial calendar for 2026, with the release of financial reports and Annual General Meeting scheduled as follows: The financial reports will be published on specific dates throughout the year, and the Annual General Meeting is set to take place in 2026. This information was shared in a Stock Exchange Release on December 11, 2025 at 13:00 EET in Helsinki. The company will adhere to this schedule for financial transparency and reporting standards.

data.title: Dec. 15 deadline for 1.8M Cook County property taxes. Use Payment Plan Calculator if needed. Averts late fees.
data.description: In Chicago, as of December 11, 2025, it has been announced that the deadline for the second installment of Cook County property taxes is December 15 for approximately 1.8 million properties, including homes. Property owners are reminded to settle their taxes within the next week to evade additional late-payment interest fees. The Office reports that the 2024 Tax...

data.title: AI investments reshaping retirement rankings, Fidelity and TIAA lead as mid-tier players gain momentum.
data.description: New York - The latest Corporate Insight Experience Benchmark for 2025 reveals that AI investments are driving growth in mid-tier companies. Leading the pack are Empower and Transamerica, closing in on the top digital performers. The retirement plan sector is making steady strides in its digital transformation, with key players like Fidelity contributing to this advancement. These insights highlight the increasing importance of technology in the industry.

data.title: Greenwing expands with 2 new Oregon wines - Willamette Valley Pinot Noir & Pinot Grigio, part of Duckhorn Portfolio. Quality at accessible prices.
data.description: Duckhorn Portfolio expands its range by introducing a Pinot Noir and Pinot Grigio from the Willamette Valley, alongside its successful Columbia Valley Cabernet. The brand aims to maintain its reputation for providing high-quality wines at affordable prices. The announcement was made in St. Helena, California on December 11, 2025.

data.title: Gundry MD Total Restore praised for transforming gut health, boosts energy, and received overwhelming praise. Los Angeles, Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: In recent news, Gundry MD's popular gut-support supplement, Gundry MD Total Restore, has been widely acclaimed for its benefits in promoting healthy digestion, reducing cravings, and increasing energy levels. This news comes from Los Angeles in a press release dated December 11, 2025. Gundry MD®, known for its science-backed wellness products, has received significant praise for this bestselling formula.

data.title: Grist Mill Exchange launches metered API for gov't access, partnering with Reality Defender for deepfake protection, cutting data acquisition time from months to minutes. #governmentdata #datasecurity
data.description: Grist Mill Exchange is revolutionizing the acquisition of data for defense purposes by partnering with hundreds of reputable commercial data providers. This collaboration drastically reduces acquisition timelines from months to just minutes, marking a significant shift towards quicker, data-informed defense strategies. This innovation is set to transform the landscape of data collection and analysis. The development comes as Grist Mill Exchange (GME) establishes itself as a leading authority for commercial data, with Washington being the backdrop for this groundbreaking advancement. The change is expected to streamline processes and enhance operational efficiency in the defense sector, ushering in a new era of agile decision-making.

data.title: Arcline sells Medical Manufacturing Technologies to Perimeter Solutions for $685 million.
data.description: In a press release today, Arcline Investment Management disclosed its plan to sell its portfolio company, Medical Manufacturing Technologies (MMT), in a definitive agreement. The deal involves Perimeter Solutions as the buyer. The transaction is set to take place in Nashville, Tenn., with the agreement made public on Dec. 11, 2025. Arcline is known for its focus on growth and as a private equity firm, and the move to sell MMT marks a significant development in its operations.
INDIA AVIATION MINISTER: AVAILABILITY OF PLANES IS BOTTLENECK IN MORE AIRLINES SETTING UP SHOP IN INDIA

data.title: USDOT partners with Salesforce to modernize systems, enhancing safety with real-time data sharing and managing billions in grants. Deploying AI agents for efficiency.
data.description: In a recent update, Salesforce revealed its collaboration with the U.S. Department of Transportation (USDOT) for an extensive agencywide transformation program. As the leading AI CRM globally, Salesforce aims to revamp various essential operations at USDOT. By improving interstate data sharing in real-time, Salesforce endeavors to bolster citizen safety. Moreover, the initiative targets streamlining the oversight of billions in federal grants. USDOT is set to integrate Agentforce, Salesforce's AI agent platform, to drive operational efficiency and effectiveness.
